description: Black and grey floaters with fabric forefoot and midfoot straps with Velcro closure, engineered with adidas' ClimaCool technologyBlue top stitch detailElasticated backfoot strapStrap connecting forefoot and midfoot with brand patchFootbed with groovesTough TPU outsole with enhanced Adidas patented 'Water Grip' technology and square-shaped grooves all overOutsole curves inward at the toe and backfoot region for a comfy ride
